mapper.update: UPDATE msg_subscription SET user_id = #{userId}, template_id = #{templateId}, channel = #{channel}, status = #{status}, preference = #{preference}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_time = #{updatedTime}, version = #{version} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = FALSE
UPDATE msg_subscription SET deleted = TRUE, updated_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = FALSE
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM msg_subscription WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = FALSE

SELECT ms.id, ms.user_id, u.username AS user_name, ms.template_id, mt.name AS template_name, ms.channel, ms.status, ms.preference, ms.created_time FROM msg_subscription ms LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON ms.user_id = u.id AND u.deleted = FALSE LEFT JOIN msg_template mt ON ms.template_id = mt.id AND mt.deleted = FALSE WHERE ms.id = #{id} AND ms.deleted = FALSE
